title: quercus lusitanica var. syriaca
intro: Quercus lusitanica var. syriaca, also known as the Syrian Turkey Oak, is a subspecies of oak tree native to the mountainous regions of Syria and Lebanon. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, derived from its rich content of polyphenols and tannins. The health benefits of Quercus lusitanica var. syriaca include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, extracts, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
